primary_sources.title: Public Prosecutor v Ahmad Zahid Hamidi — 47 charges of CBT, corruption, money-laundering (High Court 2019-2023)
Ahmad Zahid Hamidi DNAA, Kuala Lumpur High Court, 4 September 2023
T4A issue 1980 (Zahid 10 May 2026 Musyawarah Nasional speech on insults law)

notes: UMNO president since 2018; DPM in Anwar's Unity Government. The 'Court Cluster' figure most consequential to the post-2022 coalition arithmetic. Charged with 47 counts of CBT/corruption/money-laundering 2019; received DNAA September 2023. Has positioned UMNO as defender of Islam-and-Rulers complex (T4A issue 1980). The political dynamics around his charges and the unity-government formation are intertwined.
